---
id: request-upload
title: "Request a file upload URL"
description: "Returns a pre-signed URL. PUT your file bytes to that URL, then call `POST /api/v1/files/{fileId}/confirm`."
sidebar_label: "Request a file upload URL"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/open/bitbybit-cad-cloud-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Request a file upload URL"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/files/upload"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a pre-signed URL. PUT your file bytes to that URL, then call `POST /api/v1/files/{fileId}/confirm`.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./request-upload.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./request-upload.StatusCodes.json")}
